implication: MERA achieves excellent physical convergence at χ=16, but statistical model selection indicates insufficient evidence for saturation regime over log-linear scaling
prior_runs: Prior Claim 3 runs exist in outputs/ (2026-02-25)
recommendations: Increase χ sweep to 32, 64 for stronger saturation evidence
Run multiple L values (16, 32) for cross-scale validation
Consider longer optimization (200+ steps) with 5 restarts
